password.min: Password must be at least 15 characters
password.uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.number: Must contain at least one number
password.special: Must contain at least one special character
password.hint: At least 15 characters including uppercase, lowercase, a number and a special character.

registration.title: Registration not possible
registration.message: The registration could not be completed. Please check your inputs or try again later.

login.title: Login not possible
login.message: Login could not be completed. Please check your inputs.

network.title: Connection unavailable
network.message: The connection to the server could not be established. Please check your internet connection and try again.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service unavailable
serviceUnavailable.message: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

404.title: Page not found
404.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

500.title: Server error
500.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

default.title: Something went wrong
default.message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.termsHint: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service.

register.title: Create an account
register.termsHint: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox!
verifyEmail.message: We have sent you a verification email. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.

hero.title: Stop building products nobody wants.
hero.description: Validate your digital business ideas with real data before you invest time and money. Evidara helps you test what actually works - before you build it.

notFound.title: Content not found
notFound.text: The requested content does not exist or is currently unavailable.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: This will permanently delete your account and all ideas. This action cannot be undone.

success.title: Account deleted
success.message: Your account has been permanently removed.
